---
date: 2026-05-09
updatedAt: "09/05/2026, 22:30"
title: AFOS Daily — May 9, 2026
locale: en
status: published
lede: "Moraes suspends the Lei da Dosimetria through monocratic decision hours after promulgation, and [STF](/en/glossary#stf) impeach recovers 14.00% on [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket). Flávio Bolsonaro launches pre-candidacy in Santa Catarina, announces Carlos Bolsonaro to the Senate for SC and speaks of a government of up to eight years. Lula remains at 37.50% and Flávio at 43.65%, with gap in slight compression."
---
# AFOS Daily · Daily Synthesis

> Moraes suspends, by individual decision, the application of the [Dosimetry Law promulgated on Friday](https://news.google.?oc=5), reopening the [tension between STF and Congress](https://www.estadao.com.br/politica/decisao-de-moraes-base-de-lula-ve-vitoria-da-democracia-e-oposicao-diz-que-stf-fechou-congresso/); the [STF](/en/glossary#stf) impeachment on [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) [recovers to 14.00% (↑1.00pp)](https://polymarket.com/event/any-brazil-stf-justice-removed-by-impeachment-before-2027). In Florianópolis, Flávio Bolsonaro [launches pre-candidacy](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxPWnQ3dGFUYUdKb3ZVUVl5VFdPXzRZQU8zZ0FIdjhUWHZNRzBsWDhlNXRidmwyN09xNHJJM3d6cjBPZFN3bEtET29vRHJDVERZY1BnUnVhQlJQaktCbWI0VTBleGp4cGFlZk9WZFhwTXNJaFJsV2FBeTlkUV81ZGJZczl1NVdTRFZDRTZ2UUlSdldTczQxVnRsWjRR?oc=5) with a "purebred" [PL](/en/glossary#pl) slate, [announces Carlos Bolsonaro to Senate for SC](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/apos-meses-de-disputa-interna-pl-oficializa-chapa-com-carlos-bolsonaro-e-carol-de-toni-em-santa-catarina.ghtml) and [speaks of a government of up to eight years](https://news.google.?oc=5). Lula remains at 37.50% and Flávio at 43.65% (↓0.20pp), with gap in slight compression.

## 1. Prediction market

On [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) on May 9 at 9h BRT, **Lula** remains stable at 37.50% and **Flávio Bolsonaro** registers 43.65% (↓0.20pp), with the spread falling to +6.15pp (vs. +6.35pp the previous day). This is the third consecutive session of slight compression, without either candidate yielding significant ground. Renan Santos remains at 5.85%, [Zema rises slightly to 4.35% (↑0.10pp)](https://news.google.?oc=5), Haddad remains at 4.05%, and Caiado holds 1.45%.

In the runoff, Flávio surges to 66.50% (↑1.00pp), further consolidating his position as Lula's expected opponent, who remains at 19.50%. The negative highlight of the section is Alckmin: [2L returns 1.60% (↓0.75pp)](https://polymarket.com/event/brazil-presidential-election-first-round-2nd-place), correcting the previous day's jump. Haddad yields slightly to 2.95% (↓0.30pp).

The dispute for third place enters a stabilization phase: Zema maintains the lead at 35.00% (stable), Renan remains at 32.50%, but **Caiado returns 13.50% (↓2.50pp)**, correcting the jump recorded on May 8. Flávio yields to 4.85% and Haddad to 3.95%.

The most relevant movement of the day is in the [STF impeach](https://polymarket.com/event/any-brazil-stf-justice-removed-by-impeachment-before-2027), which **recovers 14.00% (↑1.00pp from 13.00%)**, in a movement that coincides chronologically with Moraes' decision — although the market prices institutional tension, and not direct causality, given that the impeachment of justices depends on a Senate vote. In the [Senate](/en/glossary#senado), [MDB](/en/glossary#mdb) returns strongly 3.30% (↓3.10pp) and [PSB](/en/glossary#psb) returns strongly 1.25% (↓2.35pp) — correcting strange movements from the previous day. [PL](/en/glossary#pl) remains at 81.50%, [Republicanos](/en/glossary#republicanos) recover slightly to 1.00% (↑0.25pp). In [2026 inflation](https://polymarket.com/event/brazil-annual-inflation-2026), the extraordinary event of the day: the high bands (≥6.50%) return to 27.60% (↓17.10pp) — a movement without parallel in the recent period. The 5.00–5.49% band retakes the lead at 32.75%.

## 2. What the polling institutes registered

[VEJA reports](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/nova-pesquisa-quaest-mostra-disputa-lula-x-flavio-a-menos-de-cinco-meses-da-eleicao/) that [Quaest](/en/glossary#quaest) began on May 8 a new national round following the rejection of Jorge Messias and the Lula × Trump meeting, with publication scheduled for May 13. Data collection encompasses an especially charged political context: the government's institutional defeat in the Senate, a bilateral meeting in the US, Operation Compliance Zero against Ciro Nogueira and — now — Moraes' individual decision on Dosimetry. Exame [summarizes the week's polling picture](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxQV1psbVNaUXFXT1hRQTFRM1prdUQ0cDhTY2ZwNy01M3JCQnBxRm9fSDJ1aFp0NFQzbGNSekxCYmg5Y1NIVWo2bXB6VmNfYWJYWW9ocTRra0VQN0huNEg0a19rN2lmdnNzV2ZrUGhxQTFuUDVEcmtWSEp5SXozV1ZMcjJhQkM1ZUlfeUxiV25JRkgtU2FUVHpNU051amk?oc=5) — Meio/Ideia, Real Time, [Paraná Pesquisas](/en/glossary#parana-pesquisas) — with no new publications this Saturday.

In the [TSE](/en/glossary#tse) [registry](https://eleitor.tse.jus.br/sip/sip-pesquisas), the latest national publications remain active: [AtlasIntel](/en/glossary#atlasintel) April 28 (Lula 46.6%, Flávio 39.7%) and Real Time Big Data May 5 (Lula 40%, Flávio 34%). The next window is dense: three IPOP surveys on May 10, seven surveys on May 11 (~9,270 respondents), with publications concentrated between May 13 ([Quaest](/en/glossary#quaest), Real Time, [Paraná Pesquisas](/en/glossary#parana-pesquisas)) and May 14 ([AtlasIntel](/en/glossary#atlasintel) ×2 + Vox + Gerp).

In state races, [Folha de S.Paulo](https://redir.folha.com.br/redir/online/poder/rss091/*https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/poder/2026/05/desembargador-prega-neutralidade-politica-no-rio-mas-e-capitalizado-por-paes-e-vira-alvo-de-castro.shtml) describes the environment in Rio on the eve of [Novo](/en/glossary#novo)'s launch, with former mayor Eduardo Paes vs. Douglas Ruas as the central scenario. Exame [links possible Senate names for the Federal District](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxNZTAwUDhCLWZKWmg5UzY3LU16UFdEeVNJYUE3SmdKSl9KM3YzYlV2UmdMcUdQOWNwWTJkbnNSV3BHVG5Wc0s1X0N5MTFSSy1leW91TjFjX2hlNzZIZ1hNdXBwclF4eGFpSWFSdXAxcW5MRVpTemJrdXdRWXgyYXo1Z0ZrS0dDVEJRSjl2VWdMRjVFNDJSWExMbC1fcG9NTUdHSEZtbg?oc=5).

## 3. What the press covered

A [monocratic decision by Alexandre de Moraes](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/moraes-suspende-aplicacao-da-lei-da-dosimetria-ate-que-stf-se-manifeste-sobre-acoes/) — issued in the criminal execution of someone convicted on January 8 — suspends the application of the Dosimetry Law until [STF](/en/glossary#stf)'s plenary analyzes the actions filed by the ABI and the [PSOL](/en/glossary#psol)/Rede federation questioning the constitutionality of the statute. [As reported by Canal MyNews](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5Vb2pULUNoS1UyWVIweUt6LXZwTFNUR0c0aWlRbTVDaFg5NWlBajA2QUN0LWJUaUg5YjhxQjBDNUcwZ0Q3SHk3QlZrNGdUQzZQS1Vpdk9fSFdHVGhsb0Q0dmgtQQ?oc=5), the suspension occurred "one day after the law entered into force"; according to the [Folha report](https://news.google.?oc=5), the decision is made "for legal certainty" — a technical formulation that avoids prejudging the merits. [Estadão reports](https://www.estadao.com.br/politica/decisao-de-moraes-base-de-lula-ve-vitoria-da-democracia-e-oposicao-diz-que-stf-fechou-congresso/) polarized reactions: government allies speak of a "victory for democracy"; the opposition claims "[STF](/en/glossary#stf) shut down Congress". Those convicted on January 8 [are already threatening to react](https://www.estadao.com.br/politica/condenados-do-8-de-janeiro-ameacam-reagir-se-governo-lula-judicializar-pl-da-dosimetria-nprp/) if the government pursues legal action. [VEJA details](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/as-razoes-do-pt-para-pedir-ao-stf-a-suspensao-da-lei-da-dosimetria/) [PT](/en/glossary#pt)'s arguments in the suspension request.

In Florianópolis, Flávio Bolsonaro [launched the "purebred" slate](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/apos-meses-de-disputa-interna-pl-oficializa-chapa-com-carlos-bolsonaro-e-carol-de-toni-em-santa-catarina.ghtml) for Governor Jorginho Mello's ([PL](/en/glossary#pl)) reelection, with Carlos Bolsonaro and deputy Carol de Toni nominated for Senate — Esperidião Amin was excluded from the slate. In remarks on Friday, Flávio spoke of a government lasting up to eight years, reversing previous signaling against reelection; on Saturday, [he returned to defending a single five-year term](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/flavio-bolsonaro-contraria-postura-sobre-fim-de-reeleicao-e-fala-em-governo-de-oito-anos.ghtml). [VEJA reports](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/flavio-bolsonaro-promete-acabar-com-a-esquerda-pelos-proximos-40-anos/) that the senator promised to "end the left for the next 40 years". At the press conference, [he called Moraes' decision a "bureaucratic pen stroke" and "a fix"](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/flavio-bolsonaro-critica-decisao-de-moraes-de-suspender-lei-da-dosimetria-antes-de-julgamento-canetada-burocratica.ghtml).

[Folha published analysis](https://redir.folha.com.br/redir/online/poder/rss091/*https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/colunas/painel/2026/05/tres-poderes-lula-e-o-vencedor-da-semana-e-ciro-nogueira-o-perdedor.shtml) pointing to Lula as the week's winner following the Trump meeting, and [Ciro Nogueira](/en/glossary#ciro-nogueira) as the loser after Operation Compliance Zero. The [Folha report](https://news.google.?oc=5) describes how the operation anticipated the Lula × Flávio clash over the Master case, with [Flávio seeking to distance himself from the Center](/en/glossary#centrao) without breaking alliances with [União Brasil](/en/glossary#uniao-brasil)/PP. In Florianópolis, Flávio repeated the formula ["Pix is Bolsonaro's and Master is Lula's"](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxNWWwxajhyWGRXUFZDNTdrRU10UVdoVkNVVjBMV3U2c3dzUmVEUGtmczJNTmkzZzFXUzhCNmZBYXFpR1FDbDcxNVlsYXdhUHE0elpTMWRMX3ZpOFFTS2Q5WkRfUHdYUFZKZjl4Z05tN3Bhekx6b2E0OFcwbzFFTThidElFLTdTZ25ybUpsc1dURWxIUkpEeENJ?oc=5), while [PT and the opposition compete for protagonism in the CPI](https://news.google.?oc=5) of Master. In Rio, [Novo launched André Marinho for the state governorship](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/com-a-presenca-de-zema-novo-lanca-aliado-de-familia-bolsonaro-ao-governo-do-rio.ghtml) with Zema's presence, a move that creates campaign platform tension with Flávio.

On institutional matters, [Malu Gaspar's column](https://oglobo.globo.com/blogs/malu-gaspar/post/2026/05/ouvidoria-de-ciro-nogueira-nega-informacoes-sobre-vorcaro-e-mulher-de-moraes.ghtml) reports that the Senate Ombudsman's Office, led by [Ciro Nogueira](/en/glossary#ciro-nogueira), refuses to provide records of Daniel Vorcaro's and attorney Viviane Barci de Moraes' entry into the Chamber. [Folha reports](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivAFBVV95cUxPazBhTGNGNVNnRWpNUFFuc2NWaU9uWkhsMkk1SG83NTQ1VndsT1R2LWhOaFc5VG5XcFZtaVJmZ196RTFFeFJHSW1WNEpoLUhXdzdmU3d6LVVsTy1oUjVVTGExTXRNZVRsVWR1V25PU1VrR19lYi1xbng0SDNfZUc4ei1nb28yRzBMVzc1eWJxRUFBam5US1d2YVBBVDlpNEFQTU1tZmhDdkw5NFRZdFh4UWtRVmFMZm9DQS1GTg?oc=5) that Lula government benefits total R$ 144 billion in an election year.

## 4. Divergences of the day

> **Market × institutional narrative:** the STF impeachment rose 1.00pp to 14.00% on [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) on the same day as Moraes's decision — but the procedural path (Senate vote on a request against the minister) has no new triggering event this Saturday. The movement appears to reflect pricing of **diffuse institutional tension**, not a concrete catalyst. Be careful not to attribute causality that the record does not support.

> **Lula statements × spread:** Flávio accumulated three high-impact statements over the weekend — "eight-year government", "end the left for the next 40 years", "Pix is Bolsonaro's, Master is Lula's" —, but the presidential gap **compressed** slightly (+6.15pp vs. +6.35pp the day before). The market appears to discount part of the provocation agenda as pre-campaign noise, not as a structuring signal.

> **Inflation × fiscal narrative:** the high bands (≥6.50%) returned 17.10pp in 24 hours. It is a technical correction movement (excess from the day before), not a regime change in expectations. But it reduces the oxygen for the Zema/Caiado narrative of "minimal state" in the short term, while simultaneously weakening the government's thesis of "inflation control".

## In summary

1. **The market priced institutional tension, not political victory.** Moraes's decision does not move the presidential gap, but causes STF impeachment to resume 14.00%. The movements are consistent with a reading of **rising institutional risk without an immediate electoral catalyst**.
2. **Flávio radicalizes discourse, but loses marginal ground.** Formal pre-candidacy in SC, choice of Carlos Bolsonaro for the Senate, talk of eight years of government and promise to "end the left" do not prevent a slight concession of 0.20pp. The narrative may have saturated before the national [Quaest](/en/glossary#quaest) survey post-Messias and Trump (publication May 13).
3. **Ciro Nogueira operation reopens Master front in the Centrão.** The electoral effect appears less in the Lula × Flávio spread than in each side's attempt to capture the CPI — Folha de S.Paulo records Lula as the week's winner, Ciro Nogueira as the loser.—

- [O Globo — Flávio criticizes Moraes decision: "bureaucratic pen stroke" (May 9)](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/flavio-bolsonaro-critica-decisao-de-moraes-de-suspender-lei-da-dosimetria-antes-de-julgamento-canetada-burocratica.ghtml)
- [O Globo — Novo launches André Marinho for RJ governor with Zema present (May 9)](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/09/com-a-presenca-de-zema-novo-lanca-aliado-de-familia-bolsonaro-ao-governo-do-rio.ghtml)
- [O Globo — Ciro Nogueira's ombudsman denies information about Vorcaro (May 9)](https://oglobo.globo.com/blogs/malu-gaspar/post/2026/05/ouvidoria-de-ciro-nogueira-nega-informacoes-sobre-vorcaro-e-mulher-de-moraes.ghtml)

- [VEJA — Flávio promises to end the left in the next 40 years (May 9)](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/flavio-bolsonaro-promete-acabar-com-a-esquerda-pelos-proximos-40-anos/)
- [VEJA — Reasons PT cited to suspend the law (May 9)](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/as-razoes-do-pt-para-pedir-ao-stf-a-suspensao-da-lei-da-dosimetria/)
- [VEJA — New Quaest poll less than five months before election (May 9)](https://veja.abril.com.br/politica/nova-pesquisa-quaest-mostra-disputa-lula-x-flavio-a-menos-de-cinco-meses-da-eleicao/)

- [Poder360 — Pix belongs to Bolsonaro and Master belongs to Lula, says Flávio (May 9)](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxNWWwxajhyWGRXUFZDNTdrRU10UVdoVkNVVjBMV3U2c3dzUmVEUGtmczJNTmkzZzFXUzhCNmZBYXFpR1FDbDcxNVlsYXdhUHE0elpTMWRMX3ZpOFFTS2Q5WkRfUHdYUFZKZjl4Z05tN3Bhekx6b2E0OFcwbzFFTThidElFLTdTZ25ybUpsc1dURWxIUkpEeENJ?oc=5)

- [Capricho — 2026 elections: pre-candidates for President (May 9)](https://news.google.?oc=5)

**Method.** AFOS Daily crosses market data ([Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket)), electoral polls registered with the [TSE](/en/glossary#tse), and news coverage with explicit ↑↓pp tags, separating verified fact from inference. See [how it works](https://www.afos-analytics.com/how-it-works) and the [editorial governance](https://www.afos-analytics.com/data-sources). Edition closed on May 9, 2026, 22h30 BRT.
